productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Courtballistec 4.1 White Sports Shoes
description: Built for action on the courts, but perfect as a lifestyle shoe, the nike Courtballistec 4.1 is best known as Rafael Nadal's signature shoe. UpperSynthetic leather upper for lightweight durability and comfortPerforated panels on the sides of the midfootHoneycomb patterned embossing on the forefootMolded overlay at the vamp for durabilityMidfoot shank for support and stability during quick movement and directional changesMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight cushioningnike Air unit in the heel for cushioningOutsoleMulti-surface traction pattern for versatile tractionFlex grooves at the outsole for flexibility and enhanced range of motionFull-length GDR compound in an aggressive, multisurface traction pattern for long lasting durability and traction.Shoe careBrush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
